content:
- User asked whether the DCS internals themselves can be simplified beyond privacy cleanup, especially the cache and the heavy Arc/Mutex/thread/channel machinery.
- I inspected src/dcs/etcd_store.rs and confirmed we do use the real etcd-client crate directly; much of the complexity is not from talking to etcd per se but from wrapping the async etcd client in a sync-ish store abstraction with extra worker thread, channels, event queue, health atomics, and a separate keepalive thread.
- Updated task 10 to explicitly require aggressive simplification of the DCS internals: challenge cache necessity, reduce Arc/Mutex/atomic/channel/thread usage, prefer a simpler async single-owner model, reduce state representation count, and reject merely hiding the current complexity behind a private module.
